title: Construction Workers' Guide: 10 Herbal Tinctures for Muscle Pain
description: Zingiber officinale tinctures, made from the root of the ginger plant, contain compounds like gingerol and shogaol, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties. These constituents help reduce muscle pain by blocking the production of pain-causing chemicals in the body and increasing blood flow to the affected area.
